zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter De Eyton IV於1273年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 白 比曉普斯 卡素時，他的父親Sir Peter de Eyton III26歲，母親Margery of Hulme26歲。他與Margary Of Hulme結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1328年在英國享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter De Eyton IV was born in 1273, in Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Peter de Eyton III, was 26 and his mother, Margery of Hulme, was 26. He married Margary Of Hulme. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1328, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter De Eyton IV est né en 1273, à Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter d’Eyton III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery of Hulme, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margary Of Hulme. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1328, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter De Eyton IV è nato il nel 1273 nel Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Peter de Eyton III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery of Hulme, aveva 26 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Peter De Eyton IV(이)가 1273년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 비 비숍스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Peter de Eyton III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery of Hulme(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margary Of Hulme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1328년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter De Eyton IV nasceu em 1273, em Eyton by Bishops Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Eyton III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery of Hulme, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margary Of Hulme. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1328, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter De Eyton IV родился в 1273 г. в местности эитон би бишопс кастл, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Peter de Eyton III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery of Hulme, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margary Of Hulme. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1328 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
